name: repair_missing_using_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_method_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    by arith
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_proof_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
proof
  show "rev xs = xs"
    by simp
qed
